heading: Suggested Tags
body:
When you create resource tags in the Atlas UI,
Atlas automatically suggests tag keys and values. We recommend that
you apply the `environment` and `application` tag keys to every
resource.

The following suggested tag keys appear in the Key
drop-down:

| Tag Key     | Description                                                   |
| ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| application | Key for the project, service, or application of the resource. |
| environment | Key for the deployment environment of the resource.           |

If you select the `environment` suggested tag key, the following
suggested tag values appear in the Value drop-down:

- `development`

- `production`

- `staging`

- `test`

Your recent tags appear under the suggested ones. This list includes
tags previously used for other resources.
